name: Gill's Print Shop — Front Room and Stairs
description: The front room holds the shop counter, stacked broadsheets, and the foot of the stairs that lead to the family quarters above. The shutters are closed but thin — lamplight from the street shows through the cracks.
atmosphericDetails: A half-printed broadsheet lies on the counter — a mundane notice about a lost horse, the most ordinary thing in the world.
The stairs creak on the third and seventh step; everyone in the family knows which ones to avoid.
Benjamin's reading spectacles are on the counter — he came down recently and left in a hurry.
